author: dexhunter
name: SGD TTT + HedgeMixer: Per-Layer LR Groups on PR #720 Backbone
blurb: Built on PR #720 by @agalimova. Switches TTT from AdamW to SGD (lr=0.002, momentum=0.9) with per-layer LR groups (3x proj, 0.5x fc), cosine schedule, and zero frozen blocks. 3-seed mean 1.0450 BPB on 8xH100 in under 600s eval.
